objects.name: BoilerSupervisor
objects.summary: Plant-level orchestration and overview of demand, run-state and trips.

inputs.name: steamDemand
inputs.summary: Desired steam pressure or demand reference.

outputs.name: boilerReady
outputs.summary: Boiler package is ready for controlled firing.

objects.name: OperatorPanelSelectors
objects.summary: Semantic operator commands and selector outputs after conditioning.

objects.name: Burner
objects.summary: Owns start sequence, ignition, flame proving, modulation and safe shutdown.

inputs.name: fuelReady
inputs.summary: Fuel train is prepared and ready.

inputs.name: waterOk
inputs.summary: Feedwater and drum level are within safe limits.

outputs.name: requestFuel
outputs.summary: Ask fuel group to prepare fuel path.

outputs.name: requestAir
outputs.summary: Ask air group to provide purge and combustion air.

status.name: loadDemand
status.summary: Demand handed to modulation / servo layer.

permissions.name: readyToIgnite
permissions.summary: All preconditions are satisfied for light-off.

alarms.name: flameFail
alarms.summary: Flame did not establish or was lost.

behavior.summary: Sequence-first object: permissives, purge, ignition, flame proving, run, stop and lockout.

structure.summary: Ports and internal units for burner sequence, ignition, flame supervision and fault handling.

nodes.title: BurnerSequence
nodes.summary: Owns start, purge, ignition and stop order.

nodes.title: IgnitionUnit
nodes.summary: Handles igniter and pilot demand timing.

nodes.title: FlameSupervision
nodes.summary: Proves flame and raises flame-fail if absent.

nodes.title: FaultManager
nodes.summary: Collects trips and latches burner lockout.

objects.name: FuelGroup
objects.summary: Lead/standby fuel pump group with local pressure evaluation and group-level ready/fault resolution.

commands.name: prepareFuel
commands.summary: Prepare selected lead fuel pump for burner demand.

commands.name: reset
commands.summary: Reset latched pump and group faults.

inputs.name: selectedLeadPump
inputs.summary: Semantic lead pump selector: PUMP_A | PUMP_B | INVALID.

outputs.name: fuelReady
outputs.summary: Fuel group is ready for burner sequence.

status.name: selectedLead
status.summary: Lead pump selected by operator context.

status.name: pumpA.ready
status.summary: Pump A is available and pressure-valid in context.

status.name: pumpB.ready
status.summary: Pump B is available and pressure-valid in context.

permissions.name: ready
permissions.summary: Fuel subsystem permissive presented to burner.

alarms.name: pumpAPressureLow
alarms.summary: Pump A pressure is low while pump A is expected to be running.

alarms.name: pumpBPressureLow
alarms.summary: Pump B pressure is low while pump B is expected to be running.

alarms.name: pumpAFault
alarms.summary: Pump A reported a direct fault.

alarms.name: pumpBFault
alarms.summary: Pump B reported a direct fault.

alarms.name: fuelGroupNotReady
alarms.summary: Selected lead pump did not become ready while fuel was requested.

alarms.name: fuelFault
alarms.summary: Any fuel preparation or circulation fault.

structure.summary: Selector, two pump objects, and ready/fault resolvers form the first real control-first authoring slice.

nodes.title: LeadStandbySelector
nodes.summary: Resolves selected lead/standby pump from semantic selector input.

nodes.title: PumpCommandLogic
nodes.summary: Turns prepareFuel plus lead selection into start/stop intents for each pump.

nodes.title: HFOPumpA
nodes.summary: Context-aware pressure evaluation for pump A. Pressure low only matters while pump A is expected to run.

outputs.name: ready
outputs.summary: Pump A is available and pressure-valid.

outputs.name: pressureOk
outputs.summary: Pump A pressure above setpoint while running.

nodes.title: HFOPumpB
nodes.summary: Mirror of pump A with its own run/fault context and pressure evaluation.

outputs.name: ready
outputs.summary: Pump B is available and pressure-valid.

outputs.name: pressureOk
outputs.summary: Pump B pressure above setpoint while running.

nodes.title: FuelReadyResolver
nodes.summary: Chooses the selected lead pump and decides whether the group is truly fuel-ready.

inputs.name: leadPump
inputs.summary: Lead pump selected for readiness evaluation.

outputs.name: fuelReady
outputs.summary: Fuel group ready for burner sequence.

nodes.title: FuelFaultAggregator
nodes.summary: Collects pump faults, pressure alarms and not-ready state into group alarms.

outputs.name: fuelGroupNotReady
outputs.summary: Fuel requested but selected lead pump not ready.

objects.name: CombustionAirGroup
objects.summary: Provides purge air, damper position and air-ready confirmation.

inputs.name: burnerRequest
inputs.summary: Burner requests purge or combustion air.

objects.name: FeedWaterAndLevelGroup
objects.summary: Monitors boiler water level and commands feed pumps.

outputs.name: waterOk
outputs.summary: Water level is safe for burner run.

outputs.name: feedPumpStartCmd
outputs.summary: Command to start lead feed pump.

structure.summary: Level monitoring and lead-pump selection condensed into one monitoring/control object.

nodes.title: LevelMonitor
nodes.summary: Computes semantic level state and trips.

nodes.title: FeedPumpSelector
nodes.summary: Applies lead pump selector to feedwater pump command.

objects.name: SteamPressureControl
objects.summary: Turns pressure error into firing demand / modulation request.

outputs.name: firingDemand
outputs.summary: Demand sent to burner load control.

status.name: pressureOk
status.summary: Pressure is within expected operating band.

objects.name: FlameSafety
objects.summary: Independent flame supervision and flame quality diagnostics.

inputs.name: flameSignal
inputs.summary: Raw flame quality or detector signal.

objects.name: BoilerProtection
objects.summary: Collects trip causes and exports start/run permissives.

outputs.name: tripActive
outputs.summary: Trip chain has an active trip.

alarms.name: protectionFault
alarms.summary: Protection subsystem has invalid or missing input.

compositionLinks.label: burnerStartCmd
compositionLinks.summary: Operator start command enters burner sequence.

compositionLinks.label: burnerStopCmd
compositionLinks.summary: Operator stop command initiates controlled stop.

compositionLinks.label: burnerMode
compositionLinks.summary: Semantic burner mode enters burner object.

compositionLinks.label: leadFeedPump
compositionLinks.summary: Lead pump selector feeds feedwater object.

compositionLinks.label: selectedLeadPump
compositionLinks.summary: Semantic lead fuel pump selector enters FuelGroup.

compositionLinks.label: requestFuel
compositionLinks.summary: Burner asks fuel group to prepare the selected lead pump.

compositionLinks.label: fuelReady
compositionLinks.summary: Fuel group grants ready permission to burner.

compositionLinks.label: requestAir
compositionLinks.summary: Burner asks air group to prepare purge / combustion air.

compositionLinks.label: waterOk
compositionLinks.summary: Feedwater group keeps burner aware of safe level.

compositionLinks.label: startPermissive
compositionLinks.summary: Protection chain grants or denies burner start.

compositionLinks.label: flameDetected
compositionLinks.summary: Flame supervision exports semantic flame presence.

compositionLinks.label: running
compositionLinks.summary: Protection knows burner run state for trip context.

compositionLinks.label: burnerFault
compositionLinks.summary: Burner lockout propagates into protection aggregation.

compositionLinks.label: fuelFault
compositionLinks.summary: Fuel fault contributes to global trip/protection context.

compositionLinks.label: lowLowWaterTrip
compositionLinks.summary: Low-low water trip escalates immediately into protection.

sections.name: Light-off
sections.summary: Ignition, flame proving and low-fire stabilization.

regions.name: Fault Path
regions.summary: Trip and lockout path until manual reset.

sceneGroups.name: Startup Envelope
sceneGroups.summary: Bring auxiliaries and permissives to a startable state.

sceneGroups.name: Flame Establishment
sceneGroups.summary: Establish flame and stabilize at low fire.

sceneGroups.name: Normal Operation
sceneGroups.summary: Run under demand and pressure regulation.

signals.name: raw.operator.start_switch
signals.summary: Physical burner start pushbutton input.

signals.name: cond.operator.start_cmd
signals.summary: Debounced burner start command after input conditioning.

signals.name: sig.operator.burnerStartCmd
signals.summary: Semantic burner start command available to system objects.

signals.name: raw.operator.stop_switch
signals.summary: Physical burner stop pushbutton input.

signals.name: cond.operator.stop_cmd
signals.summary: Debounced burner stop command after input conditioning.

signals.name: sig.operator.burnerStopCmd
signals.summary: Semantic burner stop command available to system objects.

signals.name: raw.operator.reset_switch
signals.summary: Physical burner reset pushbutton input.

signals.name: cond.operator.reset_cmd
signals.summary: Debounced burner reset command after input conditioning.

signals.name: sig.operator.burnerResetCmd
signals.summary: Semantic burner reset command available to system objects.

signals.name: raw.operator.mode_selector
signals.summary: Physical AUTO/MANUAL selector position.

signals.name: cond.operator.mode_selector
signals.summary: Validated selector state after plausibility checks.

signals.name: sig.operator.burnerMode
signals.summary: Semantic burner mode used by Burner and FuelGroup.

signals.name: raw.operator.lead_pump_selector
signals.summary: Physical lead-pump selector position.

signals.name: cond.operator.lead_pump_selector
signals.summary: Validated lead-pump selector after conditioning.

signals.name: sig.operator.leadFeedPump
signals.summary: Semantic lead-pump selection for feedwater object.

signals.name: raw.di.fuel_lead_select_a
signals.summary: Physical selector contact for fuel pump A lead selection.

signals.name: raw.di.fuel_lead_select_b
signals.summary: Physical selector contact for fuel pump B lead selection.

signals.name: cond.operator.fuel_lead_a
signals.summary: Debounced selector contact for pump A.

signals.name: cond.operator.fuel_lead_b
signals.summary: Debounced selector contact for pump B.

signals.name: sig.operator.leadFuelPump
signals.summary: Semantic selected lead pump for FuelGroup.

signals.name: raw.ai.steam_pressure
signals.summary: Raw steam pressure analog input from transmitter.

signals.name: cond.steam.pressure_scaled
signals.summary: Scaled steam pressure after engineering-unit conversion.

signals.name: sig.steam.pressure
signals.summary: Semantic steam pressure value for pressure control and burner run logic.

signals.name: raw.ai.boiler_water_level
signals.summary: Raw boiler drum level analog input.

signals.name: cond.feedwater.level_scaled
signals.summary: Scaled water level after engineering-unit conversion.

signals.name: sig.feedwater.waterLevel
signals.summary: Semantic boiler water level available to feedwater monitoring.

signals.name: raw.di.flame_scanner
signals.summary: Physical flame scanner discrete feedback.

signals.name: cond.flame.detected
signals.summary: Flame detection after debounce and confidence conditioning.

signals.name: sig.flame.detected
signals.summary: Semantic flame present signal for flame safety and burner proving.

signals.name: sig.fuel.prepareFuel
signals.summary: Semantic command from burner requesting fuel preparation.

signals.name: raw.ai.fuel_header_pressure
signals.summary: Raw fuel header pressure analog input.

signals.name: cond.fuel.header_pressure_scaled
signals.summary: Scaled fuel header pressure in engineering units.

signals.name: sig.fuel.headerPressure
signals.summary: Semantic fuel header pressure value used by both pump objects.

signals.name: raw.di.fuel_pump_a_run_fb
signals.summary: Physical pump A run feedback input.

signals.name: cond.fuel.pump_a_run_fb
signals.summary: Debounced pump A run feedback.

signals.name: sig.fuel.pumpARunFb
signals.summary: Semantic run feedback for pump A.

signals.name: raw.di.fuel_pump_a_fault_fb
signals.summary: Physical pump A fault feedback input.

signals.name: cond.fuel.pump_a_fault_fb
signals.summary: Debounced pump A fault feedback.

signals.name: sig.fuel.pumpAFaultFb
signals.summary: Semantic fault feedback for pump A.

signals.name: raw.di.fuel_pump_b_run_fb
signals.summary: Physical pump B run feedback input.

signals.name: cond.fuel.pump_b_run_fb
signals.summary: Debounced pump B run feedback.

signals.name: sig.fuel.pumpBRunFb
signals.summary: Semantic run feedback for pump B.

signals.name: raw.di.fuel_pump_b_fault_fb
signals.summary: Physical pump B fault feedback input.

signals.name: cond.fuel.pump_b_fault_fb
signals.summary: Debounced pump B fault feedback.

signals.name: sig.fuel.pumpBFaultFb
signals.summary: Semantic fault feedback for pump B.

signals.name: sig.fuel.selectedLeadPump
signals.summary: FuelGroup internal selected lead pump after selector resolution.

signals.name: sig.fuel.pumpAReady
signals.summary: Pump A is ready in context: available and pressure-valid while running.

signals.name: sig.fuel.pumpBReady
signals.summary: Pump B is ready in context: available and pressure-valid while running.

signals.name: sig.fuel.pumpAPressureLowAlarm
signals.summary: Pump A pressure is below setpoint while pump A is running.

signals.name: sig.fuel.pumpBPressureLowAlarm
signals.summary: Pump B pressure is below setpoint while pump B is running.

signals.name: sig.fuel.pumpAFault
signals.summary: Pump A fault exported to the fuel group alarm layer.

signals.name: sig.fuel.pumpBFault
signals.summary: Pump B fault exported to the fuel group alarm layer.

signals.name: sig.fuel.activePump
signals.summary: Active fuel pump exported by FuelReadyResolver.

signals.name: sig.fuel.fuelReady
signals.summary: FuelGroup exported ready permission for burner sequence.

signals.name: sig.fuel.fuelGroupNotReady
signals.summary: Fuel was requested but the selected lead pump did not become ready.

signals.name: sig.fuel.fuelFault
signals.summary: Aggregated fuel group fault exported to protection and diagnostics.

signals.name: raw.di.fan_run_fb
signals.summary: Physical combustion fan run feedback input.

signals.name: cond.air.fan_run_fb
signals.summary: Debounced combustion fan run feedback.

signals.name: sig.air.fanRunFb
signals.summary: Semantic fan run feedback used by purge and shutdown timing.

signals.name: raw.di.trip_chain_healthy
signals.summary: Physical trip-chain healthy feedback.

signals.name: cond.protection.trip_chain_healthy
signals.summary: Validated trip-chain healthy signal.

signals.name: sig.protection.tripChainHealthy
signals.summary: Semantic protection-chain healthy status.

signals.name: sig.protection.startPermissive
signals.summary: Protection exported start permissive for burner sequence.

signals.name: raw.di.low_low_water_trip
signals.summary: Physical low-low water trip switch.

signals.name: cond.feedwater.low_low_trip
signals.summary: Validated low-low water trip after debounce.

signals.name: sig.feedwater.lowLowWaterTrip
signals.summary: Semantic low-low water trip signal exported by feedwater monitoring.

signals.name: sig.feedwater.waterOk
signals.summary: Feedwater group exported water-ok permissive for burner.

diagnostics.cause: Flame signal margin is trending lower than nominal.
diagnostics.hint: Inspect burner head, scanner lens and atomization quality before next trip.
